name: devbrother-skills
description: DevBrother agent skills for clarifying requirements, generating AGENTS.md governance systems, and consulting a stronger advisor model at decision points.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for clearer AI agent work, project rules, and decision-point advisor consults.
interface.longDescription: A small collection of DevBrother agent skills. deep-interview clarifies goals, scope, constraints, and done criteria before implementation. agents-md generates an AGENTS.md governance system and links CLAUDE.md for Claude Code compatibility. advisor-strategy consults a user-specified stronger model as an advisor at decision points — before committing to an approach, before declaring done, and when stuck — returning advice only, with mandatory read-only verification of the brief.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-interview to clarify this rough idea.
Generate AGENTS.md project rules with agents-md.
Set up agent governance for this repository.
Consult a stronger advisor model with advisor-strategy before committing to this approach.
